appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Choose how Klip looks. "System" follows your operating system setting.

language.title: Language
language.description: The language used across the Klip interface.

storage.title: Storage
storage.description: Where Klip stores your media files on disk.

maintenance.title: Maintenance
maintenance.description: Reconcile the database index with files on disk.

metadata.title: Metadata Enrichment
metadata.description: Fetch extended metadata (likes, comments, transcripts) for indexed videos.

playback.title: Playback
playback.description: What happens to the player when you navigate away from a video.

floating.label: Float in mini-player
floating.description: Keep playing in a floating window in the bottom-right corner.

pause.label: Pause and remember
pause.description: Pause the video; resume from the same time when you return.

stop.label: Stop and reset
stop.description: Close the player; returning starts the video from the beginning.

updates.title: Updates
updates.description: Stay up to date with the latest version of Klip.

auditLog.title: Recent Audit Log
auditLog.description: Last 30 entity mutations tracked by the system.
